title: Input schema of the Walmart vs. Target Price War Map Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Walmart and Target product URLs to compare.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of products to compare.

searchTerms.title: Search Terms
searchTerms.description: Product categories to search and compare.

locations.title: Geographic Locations
locations.description: Zip codes or cities to check for geographic pricing differences.

priceThreshold.title: Price Difference Threshold (%)
priceThreshold.description: Only report price differences above this percentage.
